SHUBHANG SHARMA.
$\sum_i\varphi_i$
~ MAY 02.2026, HYDERABAD.

ACADEMIC
MATH-PH
FIELDNOTES
BLOG
CREATIVE

I don't really consider myself creative in a conventional sense. But, in some capacity, I so identify myself as a "critically" creative person. I must also say, I'm quite an emotional person too. And I have an artistic mindset, in the sense that, when I tend to look at things, I most often extract and indulge in their artistic side readily. I also have some "design" oriented thinking, for example this site - which actually evolved via more than 5 designs through the years. For the most part of my adult life so far, I consume(d) art in the form of film - industry, independent and indivial. By individual, I mean storytellers like Sankho Kun, Jake Frew, Shaffer Nickel, Nikolai Schirmer. I made a playlist with some film picks!

That said, I did dabble into some random creations :).

Creative Coding x p5.js

Folding Paper

Cooking

Math x Life x Vector

Art $\times$ Science
